item.title: Convocation
item.description: The Xpiritual Bioinformatics Retreat is a one week experience of project presentations, networking, bioinformatics workshops, drinks and good talks for a multidisciplinary scientific community, sharing knowledge around biological topics. This year’s summer edition will take place from June 12, 2022 to June 18, 2022 at Pátzcuaro, Michoacán; Mexico’s magic town near Patzcuaro´s lake. Location The meeting will take place at Hotel Posada Yolihuani (Calle Doctor Cos 40, Centro, 61600 Pátzcuaro, Mich).
